meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Banana & Blueberries + Fried Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a tall glass of purple-blue kefir smoothie with banana and blueberries beside two fried eggs on toasted sourdough, natural morning light, wooden table
day_of_steps: Pour 250 ml kefir into a blender with 1/2 banana and 80 g blueberries; blend 30 seconds until smooth; pour into a tall glass.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat; add 1 tsp olive oil.
Diego: crack 3 eggs into pan, fry sunny-side-up 3–4 min until whites are set. Diana: crack 2 eggs into pan, fry similarly.
Toast 40 g sourdough (Diego) / 30 g sourdough (Diana) in toaster until golden.
Plate eggs on sourdough; serve smoothie alongside. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Apple with Almonds
meals.image_prompt: a sliced green apple fanned on a small plate next to a handful of whole almonds, bright natural light, minimalist white background
day_of_steps: Wash and slice 1 apple into wedges.
Weigh almonds (Diego: 25 g; Diana: 20 g) into a small bowl.
Eat apple first (fibre), then almonds. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mexican Beef & Lentil Bowl with Roasted Peppers, Sweet Potato & Lime
meals.image_prompt: overhead bowl with seasoned ground beef, orange lentils, roasted red and yellow bell pepper strips, cubed sweet potato, drizzled with lime juice, on a terracotta-coloured table, natural light
prep_steps: Sunday: Roast 300 g diced sweet potato at 200°C 25 min with 1 tsp olive oil, cumin, smoked paprika.
Sunday: Roast 2 sliced bell peppers (mixed colours) at 200°C 20 min with olive oil.
Sunday: Cook 200 g dried green lentils in salted water 20 min; drain and season with cumin, salt, pepper.
Sunday: Brown 600 g lean ground beef with garlic, cumin, chili powder, smoked paprika; cool and refrigerate.
day_of_steps: Reheat beef (Diego: 200 g; Diana: 130 g) in a pan over medium heat 3–4 min.
Reheat sweet potato (Diego: 120 g; Diana: 80 g) and roasted peppers (Diego: 100 g; Diana: 80 g) in microwave 2 min.
Reheat lentils (Diego: 120 g cooked; Diana: 80 g cooked) in microwave 1 min.
Assemble bowl: start with lentils at the base (fibre first), then peppers, sweet potato, beef on top.
Squeeze fresh lime juice over bowl; drizzle 1 tsp olive oil.
Serve with 1 apple (dessert). Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: a white bowl of thick Greek yogurt topped with halved fresh strawberries, natural afternoon light, marble surface
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt (Diego: 200 g; Diana: 150 g) into a bowl.
Wash and halve 80 g strawberries; place on top.
Optionally add a tiny drizzle of balsamic vinegar for blood-sugar benefit. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Asian Ginger-Soy Tilapia with Stir-Fried Zucchini, Spinach & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: a white plate with golden pan-seared tilapia fillet glazed in ginger-soy sauce beside stir-fried zucchini and wilted spinach, a neat mound of brown rice, sesame oil drizzle, natural warm light
day_of_steps: Cook brown rice: rinse Diego: 70 g / Diana: 50 g dry rice; add to pot with 2x water; bring to boil, simmer 25 min covered; fluff.
Mix marinade: 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tsp grated ginger (or ginger powder), 1 tsp sesame oil, squeeze of lime.
Pat tilapia dry (Diego: 180 g; Diana: 130 g); coat both sides with marinade.
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in non-stick pan over medium-high; sear tilapia 3–4 min per side until opaque and golden.
In same pan add 1 tsp sesame oil; stir-fry 1 sliced zucchini and 80 g spinach 3 min; season with soy sauce and garlic powder.
Plate: vegetables first on plate, then rice alongside, tilapia on top. Drizzle any pan juices over fish.
Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Strawberry & Banana + Fried Eggs on Sourdough with Feta
meals.image_prompt: a tall pink kefir smoothie with strawberry and banana next to two fried eggs on golden sourdough toast with crumbled white feta, bright morning light, linen tablecloth
day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with 80 g strawberries and 1/2 banana until smooth; pour into glass.
Fry eggs in 1 tsp olive oil: Diego 3 eggs, Diana 2 eggs, sunny-side-up 3–4 min.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g; Diana: 30 g).
Crumble feta (Diego: 25 g; Diana: 20 g) over eggs on toast.
Serve smoothie alongside. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Apple with Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: a whole green apple next to a small white dish of walnut halves, soft natural light on a wooden board
day_of_steps: Slice 1 apple into wedges.
Weigh walnuts (Diego: 25 g; Diana: 20 g) into a small bowl.
Eat apple first, then walnuts. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mediterranean Baked Salmon with Roasted Eggplant, Chickpeas & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: overhead bowl with flaky baked salmon, roasted purple eggplant cubes, golden chickpeas, fluffy quinoa, drizzled with tahini and lemon, natural light on a blue ceramic bowl
prep_steps: Sunday: Cook 300 g quinoa in salted water per packet; cool and refrigerate.
Sunday: Cube 1 large eggplant; toss with olive oil, smoked paprika, oregano; roast 200°C 25 min; cool and refrigerate.
Sunday: Drain 2 cans chickpeas; toss with olive oil, cumin, turmeric; roast 200°C 20 min; cool and refrigerate.
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C. Season salmon (Diego: 180 g; Diana: 130 g) with oregano, smoked paprika, olive oil; bake 12–14 min until cooked through.
Reheat quinoa (Diego: 130 g cooked; Diana: 90 g cooked) in microwave 2 min.
Reheat roasted eggplant (Diego: 100 g; Diana: 80 g) and chickpeas (Diego: 80 g; Diana: 60 g) in microwave 2 min.
Assemble bowl: quinoa base, then chickpeas and eggplant, salmon on top.
Drizzle 1 tsp tahini mixed with lemon juice and water (thin sauce) over bowl.
Serve with 1 orange. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: a glass bowl of white Greek yogurt topped with fresh blueberries and crushed walnuts, soft natural light, marble countertop
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt (Diego: 180 g; Diana: 150 g) into bowl.
Top with blueberries (Diego: 60 g; Diana: 60 g) and walnuts (Diego: 15 g; Diana: 10 g). Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Beef Stir-Fry with Broccoli, Carrots & Wholewheat Noodles in Soy-Ginger Sauce
meals.image_prompt: a shallow bowl of wholewheat noodles topped with strips of stir-fried beef, bright green broccoli florets and orange carrot rounds in a glossy soy-ginger sauce, sesame oil drizzle, warm evening light
day_of_steps: Cook wholewheat pasta/noodles (Diego: 70 g dry; Diana: 50 g dry) per packet, drain; toss with 1/2 tsp sesame oil to prevent sticking.
Slice lean beef (Diego: 170 g; Diana: 120 g) into thin strips; marinate 5 min in 2 tbsp soy sauce + 1/2 tsp ginger powder + 1/2 tsp garlic powder.
Cut broccoli into small florets; slice 1 carrot into thin rounds.
Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in wok over high heat; stir-fry beef 3 min until browned; remove to plate.
Add 1 tsp olive oil; stir-fry broccoli and carrots 4–5 min; add beef back; pour remaining marinade + 2 tbsp water; toss 1 min.
Serve stir-fry over noodles. Drink 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Lean beef strips (lanières de bœuf maigre)
Lean beef strips (lanières de bœuf maigre)

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Blueberry & Orange + Fried Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: a glass of vibrant purple kefir smoothie beside two fried eggs on toasted sourdough on a white plate, orange slices on the side, bright window light
day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with 100 g blueberries and juice of 1/2 orange; pour into glass.
Heat pan with 1 tsp olive oil; fry eggs (Diego: 3; Diana: 2) sunny-side-up 3–4 min.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g; Diana: 30 g).
Serve eggs on toast; smoothie alongside. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Apple with Almonds
meals.image_prompt: a sliced red apple fanned on a small plate next to a handful of whole almonds, bright natural light, minimalist white background
day_of_steps: Slice 1 apple into wedges.
Weigh almonds (Diego: 25 g; Diana: 20 g).
Eat apple first. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: French-Style Beef & White Bean Skillet with Roasted Zucchini & Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: a rustic skillet with browned beef chunks, white beans, roasted zucchini slices in a tomato-herb sauce, served with a slice of sourdough on the side, warm natural light on a wooden table
prep_steps: Sunday: Dice 500 g lean beef into 2 cm chunks; brown in olive oil with garlic, oregano, thyme, smoked paprika; add 1 can drained white beans and 1 can diced tomatoes (canned ok as pantry); simmer 20 min; cool and refrigerate.
Sunday: Slice 2 zucchini into rounds; toss with olive oil, oregano, black pepper; roast 200°C 20 min; refrigerate.
day_of_steps: Reheat beef & white bean skillet (Diego: 300 g; Diana: 220 g) in pan over medium heat 5–6 min, adding a splash of water if needed.
Reheat roasted zucchini (Diego: 120 g; Diana: 90 g) in microwave 2 min.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g; Diana: 30 g).
Plate: start with zucchini on plate (fibre first), then spoon skillet alongside, sourdough on side.
Serve with 1 banana (dessert). Drink 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Beef & white bean skillet portion (bœuf aux haricots blancs)
Beef & white bean skillet portion (bœuf aux haricots blancs)

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: thick white Greek yogurt in a bowl topped with sliced red strawberries, soft natural light, terracotta ceramic
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt (Diego: 200 g; Diana: 150 g) into bowl.
Slice 80 g strawberries; top yogurt. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mediterranean Baked Salmon with Roasted Cherry Tomatoes, Spinach & Lentils
meals.image_prompt: a white plate with herb-crusted baked salmon fillet, burst roasted cherry tomatoes, wilted spinach and green lentils, drizzled with lemon-olive oil, natural warm evening light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven 200°C. Place salmon (Diego: 180 g; Diana: 130 g) on baking tray; season with dried oregano, turmeric, olive oil; bake 14 min.
Add 150 g cherry tomatoes to tray at 10 min mark; roast together for final 4 min.
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in pan; add 80 g spinach; wilt 2 min with garlic powder.
Warm canned lentils (Diego: 100 g drained; Diana: 70 g drained) with 1 tsp balsamic vinegar in small pot 2 min.
Plate: lentils first, spinach second, salmon on top, cherry tomatoes scattered around.
Squeeze lemon juice over plate. Drink 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Canned lentils drained (lentilles en boîte égouttées)
Canned lentils drained (lentilles en boîte égouttées)

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Banana & Blueberries + Fried Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a tall glass of purple-blue kefir smoothie with banana and blueberries beside two fried eggs on toasted sourdough, natural morning light, wooden table
day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with 1/2 banana and 80 g blueberries; pour into glass.
Fry eggs (Diego: 3; Diana: 2) in 1 tsp olive oil, sunny-side-up.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g; Diana: 30 g).
Serve eggs on toast alongside smoothie. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Apple with Almonds
meals.image_prompt: a sliced golden apple fanned on a small plate next to a small bowl of almonds, natural light on a linen cloth
day_of_steps: Slice 1 apple; weigh almonds (Diego: 25 g; Diana: 20 g). Eat apple first. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mexican Tilapia Tacos with Roasted Peppers, Black Beans & Lime-Cumin Slaw
meals.image_prompt: two corn tortillas each filled with flaky spiced tilapia, roasted bell pepper strips, shredded carrot slaw, white bean cream and lime wedges, overhead view on a terracotta plate, bright natural light
day_of_steps: Season tilapia (Diego: 180 g; Diana: 130 g) with cumin, chili powder, smoked paprika, garlic powder, olive oil.
Pan-fry tilapia over medium-high heat 3–4 min per side until flaky; break into chunks with a fork.
Warm corn tortillas (Diego: 3; Diana: 2) in dry pan 30 sec each side.
Quick slaw: grate 1 carrot; toss with 1 tsp apple cider vinegar, cumin, salt.
Warm canned chickpeas (Diego: 80 g; Diana: 60 g) with cumin and lime in small pan 2 min.
Fill tortillas: chickpeas first, then tilapia chunks, carrot slaw, roasted pepper strips (use leftover Sunday peppers or fresh, sliced and microwaved 2 min).
Squeeze lime over tacos. Serve with 1/2 banana. Drink 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Canned chickpeas drained (pois chiches en boîte égouttés)
Canned chickpeas drained (pois chiches en boîte égouttés)

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: white Greek yogurt in a small bowl with a generous topping of fresh blueberries, soft light, white marble
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt (Diego: 200 g; Diana: 150 g) into bowl.
Top with blueberries (Diego: 80 g; Diana: 80 g). Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Creamy Tomato-Chickpea Beef Skillet with Wilted Spinach & Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: a deep ceramic bowl with creamy tomato beef and chickpea stew, dark wilted spinach leaves on top, served with a thick slice of sourdough bread, warm candlelit-style evening light
prep_steps: Sunday: This uses leftover beef & white bean skillet adapted — but for Thursday dinner, a FRESH mid-week cook is required (beef safe window expires). Cook fresh Thursday evening per day_of_steps.
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of red meat only keeps ~3 day(s), and this is day 4. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in pan over medium; add 1 minced garlic clove; sauté 1 min.
Add lean ground beef (Diego: 160 g; Diana: 110 g); cook breaking up 5 min until browned.
Add 1 can drained chickpeas (household total 120 g), 4 tbsp canned diced tomatoes (pantry), 1/2 tsp cumin, 1/2 tsp smoked paprika, salt; simmer 5 min.
Stir in 2 tbsp Greek yogurt off the heat for creaminess; add 80 g spinach; stir until wilted 1–2 min.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g; Diana: 30 g).
Plate skillet first; sourdough on side. Drink 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Canned chickpeas drained (pois chiches en boîte égouttés)
Canned diced tomatoes (tomates concassées en boîte)
Canned chickpeas drained (pois chiches en boîte égouttés)
Canned diced tomatoes (tomates concassées en boîte)

meals.safety_note: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of red meat only keeps ~3 day(s), and this is day 4. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)

day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with 80 g strawberries and 1/2 banana; pour into glass.
Fry eggs (Diego: 3; Diana: 2) in 1 tsp olive oil sunny-side-up 3–4 min.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g; Diana: 30 g); crumble feta (Diego: 25 g; Diana: 20 g) over eggs.
Serve smoothie alongside. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Apple with Walnuts

day_of_steps: Slice 1 apple; weigh walnuts (Diego: 25 g; Diana: 20 g). Eat apple first. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Asian Sesame Beef Bowl with Stir-Fried Broccoli, Carrots & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: overhead bowl with sesame-glazed sliced beef, green broccoli florets, shredded orange carrot, fluffy quinoa, drizzled with sesame oil and soy sauce, natural light on a dark ceramic bowl
prep_steps: Sunday: Cook 300 g quinoa in salted water; cool and refrigerate (used Mon–Wed too if scheduled, but here for Friday — cook a FRESH batch mid-week Wednesday for Friday safety). NOTE: quinoa is safe 3 days; cooked Wednesday it is safe Friday (day 2).
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of red meat only keeps ~3 day(s), and this is day 5. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
Reheat cooked quinoa (Diego: 130 g; Diana: 90 g) in microwave 2 min.
Slice lean beef (Diego: 170 g; Diana: 120 g) into thin strips; marinate in soy sauce, sesame oil, ginger powder 5 min.
Stir-fry beef in 1 tsp sesame oil over high heat 3–4 min; remove from pan.
Add 1 tsp olive oil; stir-fry broccoli florets (Diego: 100 g; Diana: 80 g) and sliced carrot (Diego: 60 g; Diana: 50 g) 4 min.
Return beef; toss together with a splash of soy sauce and lime juice.
Serve stir-fry over quinoa. Drink 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Lean beef strips (lanières de bœuf maigre)
Lean beef strips (lanières de bœuf maigre)

day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt (Diego: 200 g; Diana: 150 g) into bowl.

meals.name: French Herbed Tilapia with Roasted Eggplant, Cherry Tomatoes & Lentils
meals.image_prompt: a white dinner plate with golden herb-roasted tilapia fillet, roasted eggplant cubes and burst cherry tomatoes, green lentils with a drizzle of olive oil, lemon wedge on the side, warm restaurant-style light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven 200°C. Cube 1/2 eggplant (Diego: 100 g; Diana: 80 g); toss with 1 tsp olive oil, thyme, oregano; spread on baking tray.
Roast eggplant 15 min; add cherry tomatoes (100 g) and tilapia (Diego: 175 g; Diana: 125 g) seasoned with thyme, garlic powder, olive oil to the same tray.
Continue roasting 12–14 min until tilapia is cooked through.
Warm canned lentils (Diego: 100 g; Diana: 70 g) in small pan with 1 tsp balsamic vinegar and garlic powder 2 min.
Plate: lentils first, roasted veg alongside, tilapia on top. Squeeze lemon over everything.
Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Banana & Blueberries + Fried Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: a tall purple kefir smoothie next to fried eggs on golden sourdough toast, weekend morning light, casual kitchen table setting
day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with 1/2 banana and 80 g blueberries; pour into glass.
Fry eggs (Diego: 3; Diana: 2) in 1 tsp olive oil sunny-side-up.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g; Diana: 30 g).
Serve eggs on toast, smoothie alongside. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Apple with Almonds
meals.image_prompt: apple slices and a small bowl of almonds on a terracotta plate, bright weekend morning light
day_of_steps: Slice 1 apple; weigh almonds (Diego: 25 g; Diana: 20 g). Eat apple first. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Creamy Tomato Chicken Thighs with Wilted Spinach & Wholemeal Penne
meals.image_prompt: a pasta bowl with wholemeal penne in a rich creamy tomato sauce, tender chicken thigh pieces, wilted dark spinach, fresh cherry tomato halves, parmesan-free, warm Saturday lunch light
day_of_steps: Cook wholemeal penne (Diego: 75 g dry; Diana: 55 g dry) per packet al dente; drain, reserve 50 ml pasta water.
Dice skinless chicken thighs (Diego: 200 g; Diana: 140 g) into bite-size pieces; season with smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt.
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in pan over medium-high; sear chicken 5–6 min until cooked through.
Add 1 tsp garlic powder, 100 g cherry tomatoes halved, 1 can diced tomatoes (80 g); simmer 3 min.
Lower heat; stir in 3 tbsp Greek yogurt (acts as cream) and pasta water; stir gently until sauce forms.
Add 80 g spinach; stir until wilted 1–2 min.
Toss penne through sauce; serve immediately.
Serve with 1/2 banana for dessert. Drink 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Skinless chicken thighs (cuisses de poulet sans peau)
Skinless chicken thighs (cuisses de poulet sans peau)

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: white Greek yogurt topped with blueberries and crushed walnuts in a glass bowl, soft afternoon light on a wooden table
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt (Diego: 180 g; Diana: 150 g) into bowl.
Top with blueberries (60 g each) and walnuts (Diego: 20 g; Diana: 15 g). Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Cumin-Turmeric Salmon with Roasted Bell Peppers, Zucchini & White Bean Mash
meals.image_prompt: a white plate with golden cumin-turmeric salmon fillet, colourful roasted bell pepper strips, zucchini slices and a smooth white bean mash, olive oil drizzle, warm Saturday evening light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven 200°C. Slice bell pepper (80 g) and zucchini (100 g); toss with olive oil, smoked paprika, black pepper; roast 20 min.
Season salmon (Diego: 180 g; Diana: 130 g) with cumin, turmeric, garlic powder, 1 tsp olive oil; bake on separate tray 14 min.
Drain and rinse canned white beans (Diego: 100 g; Diana: 70 g); mash with fork with 1 tsp olive oil, garlic powder, lemon juice, salt until smooth.
Warm white bean mash in microwave 1 min.
Plate: white bean mash first, roasted veg alongside, salmon on top.
Squeeze lemon over salmon. Drink 500 ml water.

ingredients.item: Canned white beans (haricots blancs en boîte)
Canned white beans (haricots blancs en boîte)

meals.image_prompt: a blueberry-banana kefir smoothie in a tall glass beside fried eggs topped with crumbled feta on sourdough toast, relaxed Sunday morning light, linen tablecloth
day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with 1/2 banana and 80 g blueberries; pour into glass.
Fry eggs (Diego: 3; Diana: 2) in 1 tsp olive oil sunny-side-up 3–4 min.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g; Diana: 30 g); crumble feta (Diego: 25 g; Diana: 20 g) over eggs.
Serve smoothie alongside. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mexican Egg & Chickpea Burrito Bowl with Roasted Peppers, Spinach & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: overhead bowl with fluffy brown rice, spiced chickpeas, soft scrambled-style eggs folded through spinach, colourful roasted pepper strips, lime wedge on the side, bright Sunday midday light
day_of_steps: Cook brown rice (Diego: 70 g dry; Diana: 50 g dry) in salted water 25 min; drain.
Roast sliced bell pepper (Diego: 80 g; Diana: 60 g) with olive oil and cumin 15 min at 200°C.
Drain and rinse chickpeas (Diego: 80 g; Diana: 60 g); warm in pan with cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, 1 tsp olive oil 3 min.

Beat eggs (Diego: 3; Diana: 2) with salt; cook in lightly oiled pan over low-medium heat, folding gently (not scrambled, more like baked omelette strips) 3–4 min; add 60 g spinach last minute, stir until wilted.
Assemble bowl: rice base, then spinach-egg mixture, chickpeas, roasted peppers.
Squeeze lime juice over; drizzle 1 tsp olive oil. Serve with 1/2 orange. Drink 500 ml water.

meals.image_prompt: a plate with golden turmeric tilapia, dark roasted broccoli florets and caramelised carrot slices, a mound of green lentils glistening with a light vinegar dressing, warm Sunday evening light

Season tilapia (Diego: 170 g; Diana: 120 g) with turmeric, ginger powder, garlic powder, 1 tsp olive oil; pan-fry 3–4 min per side.
Warm canned lentils (Diego: 100 g; Diana: 70 g) in small pan; dress with 1 tsp apple cider vinegar, 1/2 tsp cumin, salt.
Plate: lentils first, roasted veg alongside, tilapia on top.
Drizzle 1/2 tsp sesame oil as finishing flavour. Drink 500 ml water.
